recommendations.title: Quest for Camelot
recommendations.overview: During the times of King Arthur, Kayley is a brave girl who dreams of following her late father as a Knight of the Round Table. The evil Ruber wants to invade Camelot and take the throne of King Arthur, and Kayley has to stop him.

recommendations.title: A Knight in Camelot
recommendations.overview: Yet another variation on Mark Twain's "A Connecticut Yankee At King Arthur's Court." Here, a computer malfunction causes a science researcher to be sent back in time with her laptop, which she uses to amaze the court.

recommendations.title: Arthur & Merlin: Knights of Camelot
recommendations.overview: King Arthur returns home after fighting the Roman Empire. His illegitimate son has corrupted the throne of Camelot and King Arthur must reunite with the wizard Merlin and the Knights of the Round Table to fight to get back his crown.

recommendations.title: Aquaman
recommendations.overview: Half-human, half-Atlantean Arthur Curry is taken on the journey of his lifetime to discover if he is worth of being a king.

recommendations.title: Freaks Out
recommendations.overview: Four super-powered circus freaks find themselves trapped in war-torn Rome after their foster father is captured by the Nazis.

recommendations.title: Monty Python and the Holy Grail
recommendations.overview: King Arthur, accompanied by his squire, recruits his Knights of the Round Table, including Sir Bedevere the Wise, Sir Lancelot the Brave, Sir Robin the Not-Quite-So-Brave-As-Sir-Lancelot and Sir Galahad the Pure. On the way, Arthur battles the Black

recommendations.title: Black Clover: Sword of the Wizard King
recommendations.overview: As a lionhearted boy who can't wield magic strives for the title of Wizard King, four banished Wizard Kings of yore return to crush the Clover Kingdom.

recommendations.title: The Voyagers
recommendations.overview: Time jump to 1939 with teenager Max and his friends as they try to navigate Mussolini's Rome and find Max's missing brother.

recommendations.title: The King and the Mockingbird
recommendations.overview: A young shepherdess and a chimneysweep plan to get married and escape the clutches of a tyrannical king in love with her, assisted by the guile of a cheeky mockingbird, the king's archenemy.

recommendations.title: Die Nibelungen: Siegfried
recommendations.overview: Siegfried, son of King Siegmund of Xanten, travels to Worms, capital of the Burgundian kingdom, to ask King Gunther for the hand of his sister, the beautiful Kriemhild.
